home.title: Track AI usage from your menu bar
home.subtitle: TokenBar aggregates tokens, credits, spend, quotas, and burn rate across Cursor, OpenAI, Anthropic, and more—without opening separate dashboards.

menuBar.title: Menu bar indicator
menuBar.description: Percentage, progress bar, spend, credits, burn rate, or multi-provider aggregate.

providers.title: Multiple providers
providers.description: Cursor Personal & Team, OpenAI, Anthropic, and a custom HTTP proxy.

forecast.title: Usage forecasting
forecast.description: Burn rate and exhaustion estimates from local history.

alerts.title: Native alerts
alerts.description: macOS notifications at usage thresholds and forecasted exhaustion.

widget.title: Desktop widget
widget.description: Notification Center widget with cached usage snapshots.

privacy.title: Privacy-first
privacy.description: Credentials stay in Keychain. Diagnostics export never includes secrets.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Install TokenBar, connect providers, and customize how usage appears in your menu bar.
installSteps: Download the latest DMG from GitHub Releases.
Open the disk image and drag TokenBar to Applications.
Launch TokenBar—it lives in the menu bar with no Dock icon.
quickStartSteps: Click the menu bar icon and open Settings.
Connect a provider under Providers (e.g. Cursor Personal or Demo Provider).
Pick a display mode under General.
Use Refresh Now or enable automatic refresh.

providers.cursorPersonal: Cursor Personal — session cookie from the dashboard
providers.proxy: Custom Proxy — optional bearer token + canonical JSON endpoint

docs.repoDocsDescription: Architecture, development setup, and contribution guides live in the main repository.
